visual_description: A man in a beige jacket stands beside a hospital bed, gently holding the head of a woman lying down with his gloved hand. The woman, wearing a hospital gown, has her eyes closed and appears to be resting or unconscious. Medical equipment, an IV bag, and curtains are visible in the background.
audio_description: The man speaks in a calm, concerned tone while looking at the woman.
